Dumb Money (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,919,484Details
International Box Office $4,037,426
Worldwide Box Office $17,956,910
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $20,262
Total $20,262
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dumb Money tells the story of fortunes made and lost overnight in the David-vs.-Goliath GameStop short squeeze that may have changed Wall Street forever. It offers a scathing, funny and emotional portrayal of how a loosely affiliated group of amateur investors and internet denizens crushed one of the biggest hedge funds on Wall Street and upended the establishment.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$220,947 (1.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.19 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:77.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:8 opening theaters/2,837 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,217,282

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 15th, 2023 (Exclusive) by Sony Pictures
September 22nd, 2023 (Expands Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: September 21st, 2023 (Wide) (Portugal)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide), released as Dumb Money (玩謝華爾街行動) (Hong Kong)
September 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Norway)
September 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: November 7th, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, sexual material, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2799 (cert #54152), 9/6/2023)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Non-Drama Biographies
Film festival: Toronto International Film Festival 2023
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New Jersey, United States
Plot point: Biography, Internet
Social setting: Wall Street
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Time period setting: 2020s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Black Bear, Columbia Pictures, Stage 6 Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Dumb Money tells the story of fortunes made and lost overnight in the David-vs.-Goliath GameStop short squeeze that may have changed Wall Street forever. It offers a scathing, funny and emotional portrayal of how a loosely affiliated group of amateur investors and internet denizens crushed one of the biggest hedge funds on Wall Street and upended the establishment.
